references.label: NHS England DTAC guidance
references.appliedTo: standards version context chips and DTAC scope copy
references.note: The ledger keeps DTAC as a standards context and records assessment state instead of creating a certification dashboard.

references.label: NHS DCB0129/DCB0160 review
references.note: Clinical safety controls are represented as graph-bound rows and cannot claim completeness without the current verdict.

references.label: NHS digital service manual accessibility content guidance
references.note: Tables are used only where control, owner, evidence, and graph columns have logical data relationships.

references.label: GOV.UK Design System table component
references.note: The component uses a caption, column headers, and row headers to preserve table fallback semantics.

references.label: WCAG 2.2
references.appliedTo: keyboard focus, target states, reduced motion
references.note: Keyboard operable ledger rows, visible focus states, and no drag-only actions are required in the surface.

references.label: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices 1.2 grid guidance
references.note: The implementation keeps native table semantics and provides Enter/Space row selection rather than forcing a custom ARIA grid.

references.label: Playwright ARIA snapshots
references.note: Playwright flow writes accessibility snapshots for the ledger panel and drawer surfaces.
